_comment: Pools to track. Bootstrap list before SolanaCompass top-25 auto-discovery lands. Each entry must have an SPL-stake-pool family program owner (see POOL_PROGRAM_FAMILIES in src/lib/gdi/data-sources/rpc.ts). PR-able.
_format: { pool_address: string, name?: string, note?: string, added_at?: ISO8601 }

additions.name: Definity
additions.note: Sanctum-Multi SPL stake-pool. APAC + EMEA emerging-markets focus.

additions.name: JagPool
additions.note: LATAM + Singapore + South Africa decentralisation focus. Closest peer to Definity on mission alignment.

additions.name: JitoSOL
additions.note: Largest Solana LST by TVL. Yield-focused (MEV).
